ops.body: 2026-07-18: C3's judged gate shipped and defines this audit's consuming artifact precisely: the human-labeled golden packet at ~/.cc-steer/eval/golden/watcher-fires/ (hash-pinned packet.md; labels.json pinned to rows_sha256; fires.jsonl contexts bound to the packet by row identity — loader in cc_steer/retrain/judged.py). On flag-day, a retrain with warranted disagreement fires raises GoldenGateViolation until the packet exists, so the E10.B audit's labels are the concrete unblock for judged retrains. Packet-authoring tooling is future work per the C3 lane.
